title: Meet your new phone away from phone
summary: Unihertz's Titan Elite 2 is attracting significant attention at MWC with its physical QWERTY keyboard and slim, pocketable design reminiscent of BlackBerry phones. The device's lightweight form factor and tactile keyboard keys are resonating with visitors who appreciate a less encumbered mobile experience. This revival of physical keyboards suggests renewed interest in devices that offer distinct alternatives to standard touchscreen smartphones.
content:
BlackBerries are so back.	

Unihertz's booth at MWC was a little out of the way, but those who did find it all seemed to want to pick up the Titan Elite 2. Sure, the cosmic orange color attracted attention, and the QWERTY keyboard reminded one showgoer of his old BlackBerry. But once I picked it up, I could see why it was so popular. It's slim, light, and pocketable, and the physical keys just beg to be pressed. I felt unencumbered, which I can't say about the phone I'm currently using. I didn't want to put it down, and based on the steady stream of visitors I saw at the booth, I wasn't alone.
As usual, MWC offered a bunch of odd and delightful ideas about phones that …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 认识你的新型随身手机
zh.summary: Unihertz的Titan Elite 2在MWC吸引了大量关注,其物理QWERTY键盘和纤薄便携的设计让人想起黑莓手机。该设备轻便的外形和触感良好的键盘按键吸引了那些欣赏不受束缚的移动体验的访客。物理键盘的复兴表明人们对提供不同于标准触屏智能手机替代品的设备重新产生了兴趣。

fr.title: Rencontrez votre nouveau téléphone loin du téléphone
fr.summary: Le Titan Elite 2 d'Unihertz attire une attention considérable au MWC avec son clavier QWERTY physique et son design mince et portable qui rappelle les téléphones BlackBerry. La forme légère de l'appareil et les touches du clavier tactiles attirent les visiteurs qui apprécient une expérience mobile moins encombrante. Cette résurgence des claviers physiques suggère un intérêt renouvelé pour les appareils qui offrent des alternatives distinctes aux smartphones à écran tactile standard.

de.title: Lernen Sie Ihr neues Handy ohne Handy kennen
de.summary: Das Titan Elite 2 von Unihertz zieht auf dem MWC große Aufmerksamkeit auf sich mit seiner physischen QWERTY-Tastatur und seinem schlanken, tragbaren Design, das an BlackBerry-Telefone erinnert. Die leichte Bauform des Geräts und die taktilen Tasten sprechen Besucher an, die eine weniger behindernde mobile Erfahrung schätzen. Die Wiederauferstehung physischer Tastaturen deutet auf ein erneuertes Interesse an Geräten hin, die deutliche Alternativen zu Standard-Touchscreen-Smartphones bieten.

es.title: Conoce tu nuevo teléfono lejos del teléfono
es.summary: El Titan Elite 2 de Unihertz está atrayendo una atención significativa en el MWC con su teclado QWERTY físico y su diseño delgado y portátil que recuerda a los teléfonos BlackBerry. El factor de forma ligero del dispositivo y las teclas del teclado táctil están resonando con los visitantes que aprecian una experiencia móvil menos incómoda. Este resurgimiento de los teclados físicos sugiere un interés renovado en dispositivos que ofrecen alternativas distintas a los smartphones de pantalla táctil estándar.

title: Anthropic to challenge DOD’s supply-chain label in court
summary: Anthropic CEO Dario Amodei plans to challenge the Department of Defense's designation of the company as a supply-chain risk, arguing that most customers are unaffected by the label.
content: Anthropic CEO Dario Amodei said he plans to challenge the Department of Defense's designation of the AI firm as a supply-chain risk. He claims most Anthropic customers are unaffected by the label.

zh.title: Anthropic将在法庭上质疑美国防部的供应链标签
zh.summary: Anthropic首席执行官达里奥·阿莫代伊计划挑战美国防部将该公司指定为供应链风险的决定，辩称大多数客户不受该标签的影响。

fr.title: Anthropic va contester le label de chaîne d'approvisionnement du DoD en justice
fr.summary: Le PDG d'Anthropic, Dario Amodei, prévoit de contester la désignation du Département de la Défense de la société comme risque de chaîne d'approvisionnement, arguant que la plupart des clients ne sont pas affectés par le label.

de.title: Anthropic wird das Supply-Chain-Label des Verteidigungsministeriums vor Gericht anfechten
de.summary: Der CEO von Anthropic, Dario Amodei, plant, die Einstufung des Unternehmens durch das Verteidigungsministerium als Supply-Chain-Risiko anzufechten und argumentiert, dass die meisten Kunden von dem Label nicht betroffen sind.

es.title: Anthropic desafiará la etiqueta de cadena de suministro del DoD en la corte
es.summary: El CEO de Anthropic, Dario Amodei, planea desafiar la designación del Departamento de Defensa de la empresa como riesgo de cadena de suministro, argumentando que la mayoría de los clientes no se ven afectados por la etiqueta.

title: Amazon.com says things are fixed after some issues with logging in and checking out
summary: Amazon resolved a multi-hour outage affecting checkout, search, and login functions across its website and mobile apps on Thursday, caused by a software code deployment error.
content:
If you were having issues shopping on Amazon or loading your playlists on Amazon Music on Thursday, you weren't alone. For over three hours today, Downdetector showed a sizable spike in people reporting issues with checkout, search, and logging in. The problem seemed to be affecting both the site and the mobile apps. But an Amazon spokesperson tells The Verge that the issues are now fixed.
"We're sorry that some customers may have temporarily experienced issues while shopping," Amazon spokesperson Jennie Bryant says in a statement. "We have resolved the issue, which was related to a software code deployment, and website and app are now runn …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 亚马逊表示登录和结账问题已解决
zh.summary: 亚马逊解决了一个持续数小时的中断，该中断影响了其网站和移动应用程序上的结账、搜索和登录功能，由软件代码部署错误引起。

fr.title: Amazon dit que les problèmes de connexion et de paiement sont résolus
fr.summary: Amazon a résolu une panne de plusieurs heures affectant les fonctions de paiement, de recherche et de connexion sur son site Web et ses applications mobiles jeudi, causée par une erreur de déploiement de code logiciel.

de.title: Amazon sagt, dass die Probleme mit Anmeldung und Checkout behoben wurden
de.summary: Amazon behob einen mehrstündigen Ausfall, der die Funktionen zum Bezahlen, Suchen und Anmelden auf seiner Website und mobilen Apps am Donnerstag beeinträchtigte und durch einen Fehler bei der Softwarecodbereitstellung verursacht wurde.

es.title: Amazon dice que los problemas de inicio de sesión y pago están solucionados
es.summary: Amazon resolvió una interrupción de varias horas que afectó a las funciones de pago, búsqueda e inicio de sesión en su sitio web y aplicaciones móviles el jueves, causada por un error de implementación de código de software.

title: The best iPad deals you can get right now
summary: The Verge rounds up current iPad deals across all models, from the 11th-generation base iPad to iPad Pro models with M3, M4, and M5 chips, with many seeing significant discounts.
content:
The latest iPad Mini is currently down to one of the best prices we’ve seen. | Photo: David Pierce / The Verge	

While the best iPad deals usually land during major sale events like Black Friday, many great iPad deals are available outside of those times. The day-to-day discounts come and go like changing winds, so there’s often some amount to be saved, particularly on Apple’s most affordable iPad and the latest iPad Mini. Hell, you can even often find discounts on the latest M5 iPad Pro, which is already on sale at multiple retailers.
All that being said, it’s difficult to know where exactly you can find the most notable iPad deals unless you’re scouring the major retailers on a daily basis. But that’s often what our deal hunters at The Verge are doing, so let us help you out. Below, we’ve rounded up the best prices on every current iPad model, from the 11th-gen base iPad to the more powerful models with the M3, M4, and M5 chips.





The best iPad (2025) deals
Apple iPad (11th-gen)

Where to Buy:

 $349 $327.59 at Amazon (128GB, Wi-Fi)
 $449 $413 at Amazon (256GB, Wi-Fi)
 $349 at Walmart (128GB, Wi-Fi)

Apple’s 11th-gen iPad landed on the scene a year ago. The newest base-model tablet is a fairly iterative update of the prior model, but with 128GB of base storage (up from 64GB) and an A16 Bionic chip, which is nearly 30 percent faster than the A14 chip used in the 10th-gen iPad. However, the newer chip doesn’t support the various Apple Intelligence features introduced in iPadOS 18.1 and subsequent updates. For that, you’ll want to opt for a more recent iPad Air, iPad Mini, or iPad Pro model.
Pricing-wise, the latest iPad starts at $349 with Wi-Fi and 128GB of storage. You can also upgrade to 256GB or 512GB of storage for an additional $100 or $200, respectively, or purchase an LTE model starting at $499. We saw a pretty significant price drop to $279 on Black Friday, but right now it’s only available at Amazon starting at $327.59, which saves you $21. Alternativel

zh.title: 你现在能买到的最好iPad交易
zh.summary: The Verge汇总了所有iPad型号的当前交易，从第11代基础iPad到配备M3、M4和M5芯片的iPad Pro型号，许多都获得了显著折扣。

fr.title: Les meilleures offres iPad disponibles en ce moment
fr.summary: The Verge récapitule les offres iPad actuelles pour tous les modèles, du iPad base de 11e génération aux modèles iPad Pro avec puces M3, M4 et M5, beaucoup offrant des réductions importantes.

de.title: Die besten iPad-Angebote, die Sie jetzt bekommen können
de.summary: The Verge fasst aktuelle iPad-Angebote für alle Modelle zusammen, vom iPad der 11. Generation bis zu iPad Pro-Modellen mit M3-, M4- und M5-Chips, von denen viele erhebliche Rabatte bieten.

es.title: Las mejores ofertas de iPad que puedes obtener ahora
es.summary: The Verge recopila las ofertas actuales de iPad en todos los modelos, desde el iPad base de 11ª generación hasta los modelos iPad Pro con chips M3, M4 y M5, muchos con descuentos significativos.

title: What if your real computer was a super-sized Lego computer brick?
summary: Industrial designer Paul Staal created a working desktop PC called the M2x2, a 3D-printed case for a Mac Mini designed as a ten-times-enlarged homage to the classic 1979 Lego computer brick, featuring a touchscreen display.
content:
The M2x2 in action. | Image: Paul Staal	

In 1979 - nearly 50 years ago - Lego jazzed up its very first spaceships with an iconic sloped computer brick that was just painted plastic. In 2022, we introduced you to the engineer who fit an actual tiny computer inside.
Now, industrial designer Paul Staal has flipped the script with a working desktop PC that's a super-sized homage to the classic computer brick (via Reddit and Hackster.io).
It's ten times bigger than the original:
The "M2x2" is largely a 3D-printed case for a Mac Mini - one you can freely print at home yourself - but it's not just a shell. He's outfitted it with a 7-inch IPS touchscreen display, and a full array of add …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 如果你的真实电脑是一个超大号乐高电脑砖？
zh.summary: 工业设计师保罗·施塔尔创造了一台名为M2x2的工作台式电脑，这是一个为Mac Mini设计的3D打印外壳，是对经典1979年乐高电脑砖的十倍放大致敬，配备触摸屏显示器。

fr.title: Et si votre ordinateur était une gigantesque brique Lego ?
fr.summary: Le designer industriel Paul Staal a créé un ordinateur de bureau fonctionnel appelé M2x2, un boîtier imprimé en 3D pour Mac Mini conçu comme un hommage agrandi dix fois à la brique informatique Lego classique de 1979, doté d'un écran tactile.

de.title: Was wäre, wenn Ihr echter Computer ein übergroßer Lego-Computerstein wäre?
de.summary: Der Industriedesigner Paul Staal hat einen funktionsfähigen Desktop-PC namens M2x2 entwickelt, ein 3D-gedrucktes Gehäuse für einen Mac Mini, das als zehnfach vergrößerte Hommage an den klassischen Lego-Computerstein von 1979 mit einem Touchscreen-Display gestaltet ist.

es.title: ¿Y si tu computadora real fuera un ladrillo de computadora Lego de tamaño gigante?
es.summary: El diseñador industrial Paul Staal creó una computadora de escritorio funcional llamada M2x2, una carcasa impresa en 3D para una Mac Mini diseñada como un homenaje diez veces ampliado al clásico ladrillo de computadora Lego de 1979, con una pantalla táctil.
